prompt:
Theme:
Sea Breeze Journey

Person/Expression:
A woman in her 20s. A natural and mature Japanese woman's atmosphere. Black-brown hair tied in a low, loose side ponytail, with airy thin bangs and stray hairs around the face slightly swaying in the sea breeze. Transparent Japanese-style photo makeup, light pink-beige lips, natural blush, and realistic skin texture. The expression is a gentle smile, naturally looking down at a camera positioned low rather than from slightly above.

Clothing/Pose:
A Japanese marine-style outfit combining an ivory short-sleeved blouse with a high-waisted flare skirt of the same color. Thin navy lines and a small ribbon at the collar, made of lightweight summer material that isn't too sheer. White socks and white platform sneakers on the feet. The person stands on a stone pavement by the sea, weight on the right leg, with the left leg slightly forward. The person uses her right hand to lift the hem of the skirt wide to the side, with the fabric fluttering in the sea breeze. A safe white inner short pant is visible naturally, without any vulgar exposure. Her left hand is relaxed by her side.

Background/Lighting:
A seaside promenade. A cute cream-colored carry-on case with a pale beige ribbon decoration is in the lower left. The background features the blue sea, low mountain ranges, a distant lighthouse-like silhouette, and a fence with stone pillars and metal ropes. A sunny summer afternoon. The sun shines strongly from the upper left, creating bright highlights on the edges of the hair and skirt. Soft shadows fall on the right side of the person, and reflected light from the sea brightens the legs and white clothing. The sky is pale blue with thin white clouds.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition. A low-angle full-body portrait. The person is positioned largely to the right of the frame, leaving wide blue sky space above. The carry-on case is in the lower left, slightly ahead of the person's feet. The distance captures the full body, with the skirt's flare crossing the center of the frame. The camera is lower than waist level, looking slightly up. Focus is on the face, with the background naturally blurred. Not too wide-angle, ensuring a natural portrait expression without distorting legs or face.

Texture/Style:
High-quality Japanese-style photography with the transparency of a summer seaside. Bright tones based on soft whites and pale blues. Skin maintains natural texture, avoiding excessive beauty correction or a plastic feel. Meticulous depiction of the thinness of the white fabric, the layering of the wind-blown skirt, and the roundness and ribbon texture of the carry-on case. A refreshing and slightly literary travel photo atmosphere.

Negative:
Faces that look like minors, infantilization, excessive exposure, emphasis on underwear, overly sheer clothing, exposure of private parts, sexual poses, unnatural faces or gaze, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, gravity-defying skirt or fabric, distorted carry-on case, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin smoothing, plastic skin, excessive HDR, text, logos, watermarks, brand marks, obvious AI feel.
